mechanism: Reserve scarcity triggers Phase 1 (plumbing stress) of the stress sequence by causing sudden funding market dysfunction. The nonlinear kink in the demand curve means the transition from adequate to scarce reserves is abrupt, not gradual — producing a cliff effect rather than a slope.
regime_dependence: Active only during QT or periods of reserve drainage. The threshold location shifts with bank behavior and regulatory interpretation. September 2019 is the sole clean observation.
